insights.title: Revenue accelerating
insights.claim: Revenue growth moved from +43.6% to +28.4% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

insights.title: Growth regime softening
insights.claim: Growth regime softening: YoY growth moved to -37.0% to -317.9% YoY (baseline median -92.3% YoY) in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
